steps.title: Use the chronology clue
steps.content: Akana is described as a contemporary author, and the next sentence points to older Native Hawaiian stories and earlier writers. The blank must show that this literary history came before her work.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: B would mean the history summarizes Akana's work. C would mean the history replaced her work. D would mean the history ignored her work. The word showing an earlier tradition came before the contemporary author fits. The answer is A.
